query: SELECT id, code FROM cpa_supervision_roles WHERE code IN ('RE', 'HO_ARCH', 'HO_STRUCTURAL', 'CIVIL_INSPECTOR', 'HO_MECHANICAL', 'MEP_INSPECTOR', 'HO_ELECTRICAL', 'HSE_OFFICER', 'DOC_CONTROLLER', 'QA_QC')
